tweet.text:
Watchlist for tomorrow is not nearly as stacked as today's. 

$TWLO and $ROKU are on ER ignition candle watch. I got a little starter in $TWLO in afters. I own some $HPE and $OPEN but would add. 

I think that software companies who figure out how to continue top-line growth but slash expenses and prove that they can be nimble and adapt in an AI-first world will win. There are several large software bases that held up tremendously well despite IGV selling off as hard as it did. $TWLO $ROKU $NET $ZM to name a few.

Also monitoring the situation on $UUUU $UEC $DNN $CCJ Just need a tight day, and they would be ready to go in my mind. They could also go without one, but I'll likely just wait for the tight day.
